name: Orca Security
description: Orca Security — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Cloud Security.

seo.title: Orca Security Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Orca Security analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Orca Security is a Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec tool.
pros: Integrates into CI/CD for developer-friendly security checks
cons: False positives require ongoing developer triage time
review.best_for: Dev teams needing SAST, DAST, or SCA in the pipeline
review.not_for: Projects with no regulatory or security compliance needs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
